channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Immigration courts accelerate deportations with mass hearings
item.description: The Justice Department schedules hundreds of immigrants for group hearings, risking deportation if they fail to appear.

item.title: Therapists adopt AI for note-taking, raising privacy concerns
item.description: New AI tools assist mental health professionals with administration, but questions about trust and confidentiality emerge.

item.title: An unlikely coalition in West Texas opposes border wall expansion
item.description: A diverse group across the political spectrum has united to protest a border wall in the Big Bend region.

item.title: Texas GOP primary race could influence party's future and Senate control
item.description: Attorney General Ken Paxton challenges Senator John Cornyn in a high-stakes, $100 million contest with broad implications.
